zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势震荡延续下行压力
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD整体维持偏弱震荡格局，价格运行于短期低位区间，反弹动能有限，空头仍占主导市场情绪偏谨慎，缺乏强劲买盘推动

MACD指标持续位于零轴下方并扩大负值，动能偏空；价格明显低于SMA20，均线压制仍然有效短期反弹空间受限延续弱势

支撑关注1687与1680附近，若跌破可能下探1650区域；上方阻力1696及1732SMA20多空分界逐渐收敛

短线建议以反弹做空为主，等待价格接近阻力区分批布局；激进者可在1680下方追空，注意风控避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading around 1689, showing a slight intraday decline of -0.21% and continuing to hover near its lower short-term range. Price remains below the 20-day SMA at 1732, indicating that short-term momentum is still biased to the downside. The tight daily range between 1687 and 1696 suggests consolidation after recent weakness, with buyers and sellers temporarily balanced but without clear bullish conviction.

From a trend perspective, ETH/USD is in a mild corrective phase rather than a strong directional move. Trading consistently below the 20-day SMA confirms short-term bearish pressure, while the inability to reclaim 1700 reinforces resistance strength in that zone. The MACD at -9.24 further supports downside momentum, suggesting that bearish momentum still dominates, even if selling pressure is not accelerating sharply.

Key support is forming around the recent low zone near 1685–1680, which is currently being tested. A breakdown below this level could open the path toward deeper support near 1650, where stronger historical demand may appear. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1700, followed by the 1730–1740 area aligned with the 20-day SMA, which is a critical pivot for any trend reversal attempt.

For trading strategy, short-term traders may favor range-bound setups between 1680 and 1700 until a breakout confirms direction. A sustained move above 1735 with improving MACD momentum would be required to re-establish bullish bias. Conversely, rejection near 1700 combined with renewed downward pressure may favor short positions targeting the 1680 support zone, with tight risk management due to low volatility conditions.
